game.title: Cutout
game.short_text: A puzzle game about moving boxes and cutting holes

details.title: Cutout
details.description:
For best experience, I recommend playing the downloadable version if possible.
Cutout is a challenging Sokoban-like puzzle game but with a twist: you can cut holes in the level and then attach them back wherever you like.
This game is created for Brackeys Game Jam 2020.1, theme is Holes. I really hope it's not such a stretch, but something like this is what my mind jumped to when I saw the theme.

game.title: ANTIGOLF
game.short_text: A stylish and clever "golfing" puzzle game.

details.title: ANTIGOLF
details.description:
Welcome to ANTIGOLF.
A stylish and clever "golfing" puzzle game.


In ANTIGOLF, the goal is to NOT put the golfball into the hole. This concept seems simple enough... but it can be stretched pretty far. 



Thanks to my sister for helping me with a lot of the art for this game!
Instagram: @jay_capricious
I am very happy with the core mechanics of this game, and am looking forwards to adding new levels in the future. This is my first game jam, and my first "completed" project ever, so any feedback you have is highly appreciated. 
I hope you enjoy ANTIGOLF!
-Michael Barba

(Mouse is recommended for gameplay)

game.title: Going Deep
game.short_text: Brackeys Game Jam 2020.1 - Holes - A Roguelike Adventure Game.

details.title: Going Deep
details.description:
Hey!
This is our entry to the Brackeys Game Jam 2020.1 - Holes[EDIT]This game came Rank #5 overall in the game jam! thanks to everyone who voted!
Going Deep is a Roguelike where you play as an adventuring monkey who ventures deep into a hole in the ground.
Avoid traps and kill monsters to try and stay alive for as long as you can!

Controls 
(Controllers supported)
WSAD/Arrows or Analogue stick to move - LeftMouse or A to attack
This game features an online Leaderboard system provided free by  http://dreamlo.com/ . Please keep names clean.

Credits
Programming & Art - CraigsArcade(Dreckly)
Awesome Music & SFX - RyanAVX

Ran out of time towards the end so the level isn't as long as i wanted it to be. So instead i have just made it really difficult towards the bottom.
Hope everyone enjoys!

PLEASE NOTE:
Mac and Linux versions are untested, please report to me if they don't work and ill resolve the issues. And any bugs found by players will be fixed in the coming days.

I have noticed some lighting flickering issues on the webplayer, these shouldn't happen on the downloadable versions if it bothers anyone.
Apologies.

game.title: Pity Pit
game.short_text: 5 proc levels, bombs, pickaxes, crafting! Controls In Game page!

details.title: Pity Pit
details.description:
FREE VERSION DOWN THE PAGE!

made for Brackeys game jam 2020.1!
thanks to everybody for the feedback :))

STEAM RELEASE HERE
PRESS KIT


CONTROLS:
Arrow keys, Z -> JUMP, X -> DIG.
You can dig down, left and right. 
You cannot dig up.
You can throw bombs up with ( aroow up + dig ).
If you DIG + DOWN while in AIR, You'll shoot an air bullet, and you'll do a double jump.


Pity Pit, 
Dig your doom, save Gwendoline from the Devil Johnson!
-Procedural Caves-Ores and Crafting-Random Powerups-Dig Holes-Bombs-More Bombs-Hardcore Challange-5 Levels-Final Boss Fight!-Dwarfs Be Digging Down Only!
You are Oratio, you are a Dwarf, and you like to hang-out around the mine with your wife Gwendoline !( Yeah, mines, what a place at which to spend your time! )
Suddenly, the Devil Johnson spawns from a nearby pit, and kidnaps Gwendoline !It has happened all so quickly but you had enough time to imprint in your mind the Devil's butt-chin!!!
Grab a pickaxe, and you jump into the pit! It's rescue time!

Support the dev: STEAM

Tip 1: Swipe anywhere. Longer swipe adds more force.
Tip 2: Destroy dirt blocks to trap enemies.
Tip3: Make stalactites fall on enemies.

game.title: Singularity
game.short_text: Create black holes to turn furniture into weapons and knock out all your enemies to escape.

details.title: Singularity
details.description:
Use your Black Hole Generating Rifle to turn furniture into your weapons and knock out all your enemies to escape.
Controls :
WASD - Move
Mouse - Aim
Left Click - Shoot

About :
Singularity is a Top-down physics shooter with blackholes made for Brackeys Game Jam 2020.1 where the theme was Holes. So I came up with the idea of creating black holes to pull in objects which will be used to knock out your enemies instead of your typical top-down shooters where you just shoot at your enemies.



 Note: apk is just a quick test to see if it could run on android. There are bugs and issues but should still be playable

game.title: Towerfall
game.short_text: A short roguelike about jumping down holes to escape.

details.title: Towerfall
details.description:
Awoken by a sound you hear in the distance, you look around. What is this place? You see a large hole before you. With no other exits, you gather your courage, and your weapon, and leap down.

Slash, shoot, or explode your way through the levels of this procedurally generated tower. Descend your way out by jumping down the holes in the floor before time runs out!

Choose between three unique classes, each with 2 unique attacks:
The Sturdy WarriorThe Precise ArcherThe Powerful Wizard

Find and encounter 2 unique bosses.
Supports both keyboard/mouse and controller setups.
This game was made for the Brackey's 2020.1 week long game jam with the theme Holes. There is an issue with the export sometimes raising a flag with Windows Defender because the game was not code-signed. This is a known problem with the Godot engine unfortunately. Not all systems seem to have an issue with it, but I'm hoping to resolve it before the end of the jam. See the link for discussion on the issue: https://godotforums.org/discussion/18489/executable-detect-as-a-dangerous-app-by...

game.title: The Plot Hole : Little Red
game.short_text: A retelling of the classical: Little red riding hood, where the player shapes the narrative of the story.

details.title: The Plot Hole : Little Red
details.description:
The Plot Hole : Little Red
About the game
Ever wanted to get eaten by a wolf? Well, have we got a treat for you, because now you can! With the all-new, all narrative, all-button using , all-wolf-being-eaten-by, video game of the last century! Want more exclamation marks? We've got them! So check out The Plot Hole, the only game where you play as a little girl who definitely gets eaten by a wolf. Still want more? Can't have it! Or can you? Check out the innovative, never-before-seen second ending to the popular fairy tale. Can't find it? It's not there! Or is it? Yes, it is there! Roger Ebert gave this game two Ace of Spades and said, "You'll play this game ... maybe!" 
This is a narrative game with voice-acting, PLEASE ENABLE AUDIO !


Controls
Mouse Click to activate your plot hole and search for words that can be removed."A" and "D" for movement. N to skip a dialogue (for replays)
Credits
Arthur Scheidel aka @LaCreArthur: Unity Programmer/Level DesignerBryan Bauerband aka Handy Corpse: 3D Artist/Narration (Some 3D Assets are from the Polygon Adventure, Dungeon and Nature series.)@El_fideo_rubio: Level Design/3D ArtistMatt Howell: Writing/StoryValidbit: Music/Sound
Sound Asset Credits:
GDC 2017- Eiravaein Sound - Door- Mattia Cellotto - Door
Soundtrack is now available here.


Youtube | Facebook

game.title: Guesstalt
game.short_text: Jump into dimensional holes to flip reality.

details.title: Guesstalt
details.description:
Fullscreen-mode highly recommended.
A thief has stolen a fragment of the Color Crystal, a shard that can create dimensional holes that can turn donuts into donut holes.It is up to Detective Scoop to stop them and to secure this powerful artifact.
A/D (or left/right arrow keys) to move left and right.
W (or up arrow key) to jump, the player can double jump.
This is a submission for the Brackey's Game Jam 2020.1. It ended up getting 7th in innovation and 21st Overall out of over 700 games!

A few players have mentioned that they were stuck on "invisible" platforms. If you get to that point, look closely towards the bottom of the screen as there is a reason why the camera pans out then. I'll make sure to make this more obvious after the jam!

game.title: Holey Guacamole!
game.short_text: Fill the hole of the guacamole's soul!

details.title: Holey Guacamole!
details.description:
5 Avocados were eaten during the making of this game.

This is a submission for a random brackey's jam with the theme of hole! 
Goal of the game:
Catch that sweet little pit, by tackling him (lovingly). Once one of you has him tackled and in your grasp, mash the tackle button to hold onto him. Then have your partner in lime (sorry) grab hold with another tackle. Tadaa.
Known issues:
The player's are supposed to be like twice as fast.The tackling works in editor- I promise. If it's having issues, try from...behind.Also apparently once you tackle, you can't move anymore.The pit is probably gonna run to a corner and then it's basically GG. I tried fixing it a lot, even right up till the deadline, but woof couldn't get something I liked-oh well, he's still a cutie!Don't look under the map. 
I thought I had another day left so I got wild and started messing with things like a madman, only to my horror did I learn that I had 2 hours left, and no amount of CTRL+Z could help me now. Still had fun and still came out as cute as I wanted it to tho!

game.title: Holems, Consulting Detective
game.short_text: A randomly generated detective game full of deception and accusations

details.title: Holems, Consulting Detective
details.description:
PLEASE NOTE: THE STORY MODE IS NOT THE MAIN GAME AND IS JUST AN INTRODUCTION. PLAY ANY OF THE OTHER THREE DIFFICULTIES BELOW STORY FOR THE INTENDED EXPERIENCE.
Welcome to Holetown, USA a small, ordinary town named after it sole redeeming feature: it's bountiful waterhole. But alas trajedy has struck. Someone has poisoned the waterhole! Mayor Holesbrook has called upon you, Detective Holems, to reveal who would commit such a dastardly deed. Many of the townspeople suspect that it was done by someone from Pit Burg or Burrowborough, but you know otherwise. The culprit is in our midst! You will need to gather clues and make an accusation. Choose correctly and you will move on, Choose wrong and you lose. Good luck Detective
This game was made in a week for Brakeys jam 2020.1. It was my second jam and game ever.
Music by congusbongus. Link:
https://opengameart.org/content/lasso-lady-seamless-loop

game.title: Linesweeper: Putty Putty Puck Puck!
game.short_text: Try not to get frustrated by the awkward controls as you sweep pucks into holes!

details.title: Linesweeper: Putty Putty Puck Puck!
details.description:
Move the Orange and Blue "diamonds" around the level and try to push the pucks into the holes of the same color! To push them you need to activate the laser beam (See controls below)
Pro tip #1
You can only activate the laser beam when it's not intersecting any pucks!
Pro tip #2
The controls can take a while to get used to. Think of them as "Moving the diamonds to align with the angle of the joystick/keyboard input"!
Pro tip #3
You can toggle between two different control modes. one-axis and two-axis. The default is two-axis mode. In one-axis mode the diamonds will move in clockwise/counter-clockwise order around the level when you move Up/Down on the gamepad/keyboard
Pro tip #4
The game is fully playable together with a friend! Connect another gamepad, or share the keyboard to co-operatively clear the levels!

Keyboard Controls:

Gamepad Controls:

game.title: Drillo
game.short_text: A 2-D Top Down Dungeon Crawler where you can only kill the monsters by knocking them into holes!

details.title: Drillo
details.description:
Welcome to my first game ever, Drillo!
This is a Top Down 2-d Dungeon Crawler where you and your friend Drillo go spelunking through caves in order to find the shiny Soul Coins! 

  

This is the first game I've ever completed, and all the art, coding, music, and sound effects were made by myself. (except the monster hit sound: kenny_impactsounds).

  

Controls:
          Mouse Cursor - Controls cursor around player.
          Left Click - Sends out a flash of light to knock any nearby objects or monsters away.
          Hold Space Bar - Send Drillo to dig a hole where cursor was. (Don't fall in!)
          W-A-S-D - Move up, down, left and right.

  

Thanks for playing!
-Btmodz

game.title: Em-Mental
game.short_text: Avoid the holes, beat the cheese.

details.title: Em-Mental
details.description:
A submission for Brackeys Game Jam 2020.1.  The theme was Holes.
Collect a ball in your mouse from the bottom of the cheese.Pull the left and right strings (Left/Right Ctrl keys or "A" and "D") to manoeuvre your mouse to deliver the ball to the door at the top.5 times.You're being timed.  See how fast you can do it!
If it wasn't a time limited (1 week) game jam, I would have found a way to create different faces for the cheese to increase the interest/difficulty.  Perhaps a two player mode would also work, especially if you could affect your opponent.  More work on the audio would be good too :-)
Press Esc to get back to the main menu.

game.title: Holey Golf - Brackeys GameJam #3
game.short_text: A physics game for the 3rd Brackeys GameJam.

details.title: Holey Golf - Brackeys GameJam #3
details.description:
https://itch.io/jam/brackeys-3/
You are on a golf course, but you have no paddle.
The only way to move the ball is to tilt the whole playground in any direction.
The physics will do the rest!
But lookout, there are many holes in the ground!
If the ball falls in a hole, you have to pay with your points. On top of that, the golf course is swinging.

If you touch the blue hologram, you get points. Be aware that you lose points if the ball falls into the holes.
You can also jump, which is very useful to avoid the dangerous holes.
If your score is high enough you get some cups which are very useless but nice to own :) 

There are more or less useful items spread over the golf course.
Camera: swap the view. Try it out. Its funny :DSpring: gives you 5 very useful jumpsLock: closes all the annoying holesClock: gives you a few seconds more to grindArrows: stops the waves for a short momentBEST ITEM IN THE WORLD
if (game.isFun)
    sendMessage("Nice game") //Thanks :)

game.title: (Subatomic) Bomb In A (Black) Hole
game.short_text: Quick! A bomb is strapped on a rocket, guide it into the black hole before it explodes!

details.title: (Subatomic) Bomb In A (Black) Hole
details.description:
A game where collecting speed-ups is just as imprtant as avoiding them


Quick! Some idiot in the lab accidentally activated the subatomic bomb that will most likely oblitarate the whole universe if it explodes !!! 
(First bomb of it's kind, so who knows...)
Luckily it's mounted on top of a missile, can you fly it into a black hole in time to save everyone? But, oh no... It's not fast enough! You need to use planets with boost holes if you want to make it!




_______________________________________________________________________________
This is our first time joining a game jam, big thanks to BrackeysTeam! Our goal was to have fun, make a game taking place in the same game universe as our main project, PlanetRealm, and hopefully finish it in time. We succeeded, now we hope it's also fun  for all of you to play! 
Not sure if this goes without saying but this is a game jam game, there's bugs. And glitches. Oh, there's MANY bugs and glitches.

Instructions:
- Download .rar or .zip file
- Unpack
- Run "Bomb In A Hole"
- Enjoy! (and rate if you participated in the jam ;) )

Made With Unity
Aside from our own stuff we helped ourselves with these great assets:
- "Polygonal's Low-Poly Particle Pack" by Polygonal Stuff
- "Rockets, Missiles & Bombs - Cartoon Low Poly Pack" by AurynSky
- "Sci-Fi Music Pack 1" by pdkmusic
- Sound effects found on freesound.org

game.title: OBLITERATOR
game.short_text: Astronomical Boss Fight, Gravity Simulation, Cosmic Visuals

details.title: OBLITERATOR
details.description:
In this physics-based space shooter, you fight the great OBLITERATOR, using a gravity hook to launch asteroids at your foe. A cosmic barrage of physics and visuals inspired by real astronomical science, with a serene soundtrack of spacy sonics. 
Contribution to BRACKEYS GAME JAM 2020.1 ("Holes")
INSTRUCTIONS
Collect three blue crystals, which will trigger the black hole to summon a minion, which will charge against you.Use gravity hook with left mouse button to attack the minion with an asteroid.When the minion is stunned, grab it with the gravity hook and launch it into the black hole itself.The black hole will now summon two minions. Repeat step 2 and 3. When you have succesfully launched two minions into the black hole, you win the game!

MADE BY
MARCUS MARCUSSENApfeTechnical artist, designer, and astrophysicistANTONIUS MARCUSSENSuinotnaArtistESBEN NYBOE EsbenNyboeComposer and audio designerVICTOR KIMProgrammer and designer

Listen to the original soundtrack made by Esben Nyboe here: https://soundcloud.com/esbennyboe/obliteratorUnzip and Play OBLITERATOR.Keep in mind we recommend a decent mid-range gaming computer to run this game properly!

game.title: A Hole In Space
game.short_text: Absorb the whole galaxy as a black hole and embrace the void!

details.title: A Hole In Space
details.description:
Foreword
This game was created for the "Brackeys Game Jam 2020.1" from 16th to 23st of February 2020. The theme for this game jam was: "Holes". Due to some real life circumstances, this project had to be done in only five days.
You can also find our other projects here.

Intro
A Game Jam is a good opportunity to learn something new. For me it was time to learn more about Unity's Data Oriented Technology Stack (DOTS) feature. This provides access to the Entity Component System (ECS), the C# Job System for multithreaded code and the mighty Burst Compiler.
With that and the Universal Render Pipeline (URP) it was possible for me to create this project with such a huge scale. Unfortunately, I was not able to build in time for Linux or Mac due to a problem with the Burst Compiler.

Description
This is a very slow-paced space simulation game. You take control of a small black hole, which roams through a universe. The movement is slow and sluggish, because everything moves by forces. Therefore, it is not advisable to try to fly with max speed, because the time you needed to accelerate is the same time you need to decelerate.  
If you are suffering from epilepsy, this game is probably not for you. This is due to the huge amount of bright stars, which flicker and rotate around you. 
Also, if you don't like slow games then this game is also not for you, because to achieve the goal you have to spare some time. The amount of time depends on how many stars you want in your universe.

Goal
The goal is to absorb the whole universe. First, absorb the nearby suns to grow in mass. Second, absorb the other black holes in the universe, if you are greater in mass. Third, absorb the rest of the universe through your new added huge mass.
You lost the game, if any black hole absorbs you. This happens if you get to close to them with a lesser mass.

Features
Every universe is unique due to procedural generation.There are 6 different galaxy forms to explore (Random, Circle, Sphere, Spiral-2-Arms, Spiral-4-Arms, Spiral-8-Arms).Each galaxy form can have a small, medium, large or huge size.
Small: 1.000 Stars (potato PC)Medium: 10.000 Stars (medium laptop)Large: 100.000 Stars (good PC)Huge: 1.000.000 Stars (High-End-PC)
Be careful if you choose "huge". If your PC is to weak, you can end up freezing your system and you have to reboot it. My setup with a I7-4790K@4,0GHz and a GTX 1070TI gets ~10 FPS at a huge galaxy.

Controls
Latest non Steam version: Press F1 to see the controls.
Game Jam Version:
WASD or Arrow Keys: apply force to your black hole in camera viewMouse: rotate the camera viewMouse Wheel: zoom in/outF: toggle FPS on/off (works everywhere)H: toggle HUD on/off (works everywhere)ESC: 1. skip video / 2. go back to main menu if you're ingame
The forces you apply to the black hole are in camera direction. This means if you press W it moves away from you, S to you, etc.

Future Improvements
For those who have a VR headset and a strong stomach, a VR port is easily possible.


Credits
Icon and Title is done by Cloud-Jumper05Music from ZapsplatVideos from corresponding specified sourceProgramming by Clever AI

Epilog
If you have any ideas, criticism or feedback, let me know in the comments.
Last but not least, have fun and embrace the void!
Just download, unzip it and run the executeable.

A third person shooter where you play as an Anti-Virus agent trying to exterminate the viruses that have destabilized the network by exploiting the "loopholes" in the network security. Fighting the viruses can be challenging because every time you kill a virus, they start to spread even more.
